name: Adobong Antigo
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Chicken or pork, cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the meat in white wine or rum, soy sauce, garlic, salt, and vinegar for at least two hours.
2. Drain the marinade from the meat.
3. Fry the meat until golden brown. Remove excess oil.
4. Add buko juice to the pan. Simmer until tender and the adobo begins to release oil.
5. Fry the extra garlic until fragrant and sprinkle over the adobo before serving.
